summary: The user discussed their experience in the fashion industry, focusing on their role as a co-CEO of a brand that emphasizes functional and stylish workwear. They highlighted the importance of customer feedback in product development and the brand's unique fabric choices, as well as their plans for international expansion.
facts: The user is a co-CEO of a brand that opened the Dale shopping mall in August 2021. The user and their co-CEO, Kim Soo-hyun, both majored in design and are visual designers. The user previously worked at a promotion company, which helped them in their current role. More than 90% of the products sold by the brand are self-made. The brand's popular products include the Spadio lines made of span fabric, such as the spaoni dress and spanio pants. The brand also offers a nylon top and bottom set called "Montaway," which is very popular. The user reported that they receive a lot of inquiries from foreigners interested in their products. The brand is preparing to expand internationally, targeting markets in Hong Kong, Thailand, and Japan. The user actively communicates with customers through Naver blog and Instagram to gather feedback on product designs. The brand customizes work clothes based on customer requests, including different colors and arm lengths. The user mentioned that they cater to one-person operations, such as small beauty shops, by offering customized uniforms.
